zh.London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex,: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其
zh.lifeSummary: John Parham於1535年出生在英國英格蘭。他於1594年10月21日與Margarett Egerton在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex,: 英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Parham于1535年出生在英国英格兰。他于1594年10月21日与Margarett Egerton在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Parham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of the places in Suffolk and Sussex, named in Old English with pere ‘pear’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Compare Parm .

variants.name: Parm
meanings: Estonian: from parm ‘horsefly’, an arbitrary surname given by a manorial official.

variants.name: Perrien
meanings: English (Devon): variant of Perriam, a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place called from Middle English piri(e) ‘pear tree’ + ham(me) ‘enclosed plot, (water) meadow’. This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. Compare Parham .
Breton: status name from a regional variant of perc'henn ‘owner (of a house)’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Parham was born in 1535, in England, United Kingdom. He married Margarett Egerton on 21 October 1594, in London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

ja.London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex,: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ディオニス バクチャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: John Parhamは1535年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1594年10月21日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ディオニス バクチャーチでMargarett Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Parham(은)는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 1594년 10월 21일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치에서 Margarett Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Parham родился в 1535 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarett Egerton 21 октября 1594 г. в местности лондон ст дионис баккчурч, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
